memories_total.description: Alias of `memories` for the documented contract in SKILL.md.

applies_to_ratio.description: Fraction of relationships that use the `applies_to` relation type (0.0–1.0). Omitted when there are no relationships or when `applies_to` is absent.

fts_query_ok.description: Whether a live FTS5 MATCH query against fts_memories succeeded.

hub_warning.description: Human-readable warning when `top_hub_entity` exceeds 50 connections. Omitted when degree is within acceptable bounds or there are no entities.

journal_mode.description: SQLite journaling mode (wal, delete, truncate, persist, memory, off).

mentions_ratio.description: Fraction of relationships that use the `mentions` relation type (0.0–1.0). Omitted when there are no relationships in the database.

mentions_warning.description: Human-readable warning when `mentions` relationships dominate the graph (ratio > 0.5). Omitted when the ratio is within acceptable bounds or there are no relationships.

missing_entities.description: List of entities referenced by memories but absent from the entities table. Empty in a healthy DB. Per the contract documented in SKILL.md.

namespace.description: Namespace filter applied to the counts. None means global (sum across all namespaces).

non_normalized_count.description: Number of entities whose name differs from its normalized kebab-case form.

normalization_warning.description: Warning when non-normalized entities are detected.

relation_concentration_warning.description: Human-readable warning when a single relation type occupies more than 40 % of edges. Omitted when concentration is within acceptable bounds or there are no relationships.

schema_version.description: MAX(version) from refinery_schema_history — number of the last applied migration. Distinct from PRAGMA schema_version (SQLite DDL counter) and PRAGMA user_version (canonical SCHEMA_USER_VERSION from __debug_schema).

super_hub_count.description: Number of entities with degree exceeding the super-hub threshold (default 50).

super_hub_warning.description: Warning listing top super-hub entity names.

top_hub_degree.description: Number of connections (degree) of `top_hub_entity`. Omitted when there are no entities in the database.

top_hub_entity.description: Name of the entity with the highest connection count in the namespace. Omitted when there are no entities in the database.

top_relation.description: The relation type with the highest edge count in the namespace. Omitted when there are no relationships in the database.

top_relation_ratio.description: Fraction of all edges occupied by `top_relation` (0.0–1.0). Omitted when there are no relationships in the database.

wal_size_mb.description: WAL file size in MB (0.0 if WAL does not exist or journal_mode != wal).
